title: Geometry, Scale, Similarity, and Spatial Planning · Spiral Review
summary: Create a scale plan for an accessible room layout with paths, clearances, paint, and flooring. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an accessible scale floor plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify angles and two- and three-dimensional shapes by defining properties rather than appearance.
Choose and justify perimeter or area models for borders, surfaces, and composite regions.
Choose volume or surface-area models for capacity, covering, and packaging tasks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
